name: signingChangePassphrase
title: Change Passphrase (Signing Service)
description: Change the passphrase for a stored signing key. Elevated: first call returns confirmUrl, retry with confirmToken.

publicKey.description: Public key identifying which key to re-encrypt (hex string)

confirmToken.description: Confirmation token from browser approval (omit on first call)

updated.description: true if the passphrase was successfully changed

status.description: confirmation_required when user approval is needed

confirmUrl.description: URL for user to visit and approve the operation

confirmToken.description: Token to include when retrying after approval
